task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Bookmark Manager** (Level 4)

Build a CRUD API for bookmarks. Each bookmark has: url (required, must be a URL), title (required), tags (text). POST /api/bookmarks creates, GET /api/bookmarks lists all, DELETE /api/bookmarks/:id removes. Validate that url is actually a URL format.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Bookmarks table:
  url, required
  title, required
  tags

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Bookmarks table:
  url, required
  title, required
  tags

when user calls POST /api/bookmarks sending bookmark:
  validate bookmark:
    url is text, required, matches url
    title is text, required
  saved = save bookmark to Bookmarks
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/bookmarks:
  send back all Bookmarks

when user calls DELETE /api/bookmarks/:id:
  requires login
  remove from Bookmarks with this id
  send back 'deleted'
